'''''Gorgon''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] which served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''Gorgon'' was dispatched to prevent the defection of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Bixby]]'' during a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy near [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]]. However, ''Gorgon'' arrived too late to prevent the Rebels escaping with their new ship.

{{Ship-stub}}
